42112.name: Abandoned Camp
42112.description: You stand in the middle of a forgotten campsite, the final resting-place of an expedition that set out into the far north to find Teralea. Frozen tents and barrels of supplies litter the area, as well as several grisly frozen corpses. Eddies of cold wind swirl around the piles of boxes.

npcs.name: Tharisian the Mudman
npcs.description: Have you any idea how good hot spring mud is for your skin?  The fruits of Tharisian's labours are used by nobles throughout Teralea.

42115.name: In the Blizzards
42115.description: The winds are sharp and stinging, hurling painful gusts of snow and ice into your eyes. In every direction you look there is nothing but whiteness - you cannot see the sky, the horizon, or even your hand in front of your face. The blizzards howl mournfully as you stumble, blundering on into the cold.

42116.name: In the Blizzards
42116.description: The winds are sharp and stinging, hurling painful gusts of snow and ice into your eyes. In every direction you look there is nothing but whiteness - you cannot see the sky, the horizon, or even your hand in front of your face. The blizzards howl mournfully as you stumble, blundering on into the cold. The sharp winds blast you with snow, blinding you to your direction.

42117.name: In the Blizzards
42117.description: The winds are sharp and stinging, hurling painful gusts of snow and ice into your eyes. In every direction you look there is nothing but whiteness - you cannot see the sky, the horizon, or even your hand in front of your face. The blizzards howl mournfully as you stumble, blundering on into the cold. The sharp winds blast you with snow, blinding you to your direction.

34000.name: Tundra
34000.description: It is colder here and the predominant vegetation has changed to low bushes and coarse grass. There are occasional patches of snow but over all the travel is fairly easy. The way continues toward some mountains to the north.

34001.name: Mountain Pass
34001.description: You have entered a narrow pass between some mountains. It is getting rather narrow here but the way seems to open to the north and south. To the north you can see other mountains bulking against the sky; to the south the land seems flatter, more open.

34002.name: High Mountain Pass
34002.description: You are quite high now and the air is getting thin. Your breath leaps from your mouth in frosty plumes and your feet slip on occasional patches of ice. The trail makes a sudden jog to the east here.

34003.name: Base of the Slide
34003.description: You stand at the foot of a rough slide of rocks, dead trees, and various other debris. The slide is steep but passable and appears to flatten out about a hundred feet up. A narrow trail leads west.

42087.name: Climbing the Cliff
42087.description: The path that winds up the mountainside is so narrow you can only shuffle along sideways, clinging desperately onto whatever handholds you can find on this unforgiving rock face. Blasts of cold wind threaten to dislodge you at any time, ice whipped viciously in your face.

42088.name: Edge of the Plateau
42088.description: You stand on the very edge of an icy plateau that seems to be the roof of the world itself. The clouds above seem closer than you have ever seen them, and the air is bitterly cold. The plateau extends north for endless miles, disappearing into the white void beyond. A tall stand of valerian sways gently, its pink flowers releasing a pungent odor.

42090.name: In the Blizzards
42090.description: The winds are sharp and stinging, hurling painful gusts of snow and ice into your eyes. In every direction you look there is nothing but whiteness - you cannot see the sky, the horizon, or even your hand in front of your face. The blizzards howl mournfully as you stumble, blundering on into the cold.

The blizzards howl mournfully as you stumble, blundering on into the cold. The sharp winds blast you with snow, blinding you to your direction.

34023.name: The Frozen Waste
34023.description: The frigid temperature turns your breath into frosty plumes with every exhalation. The ground is littered with head-sized chunks of ice and rock which make the footing treacherous. A light dusting of snow blankets everything and the wind has sculpted it into small drifts in many places.

34025.name: The Frozen Waste
34025.description: The frigid temperature turns your breath into frosty plumes with every exhalation. The ground is littered with head-sized chunks of ice and rock which make the footing treacherous. A light dusting of snow blankets everything and the wind has sculpted it into small drifts in many places. To the south a small canyon beckons.

34004.name: Escarpment
34004.description: You stand on an escarpment looking down on a frozen wasteland of rocks and snow. There are mountains in the far distance to the north and a steep slide leads down and south from here.

34005.name: The Frozen Waste
34005.description: The frigid temperature turns your breath into frosty plumes with every exhalation. The ground is littered with head-sized chunks of ice and rock which make the footing treacherous. A light dusting of snow blankets everything and the wind has sculpted it into small drifts in many places. Impassable mountains prevent travel to the south and west.

34008.name: The Frozen Waste
34008.description: The frigid temperature turns your breath into frosty plumes with every exhalation. The ground is littered with head-sized chunks of ice and rock which make the footing treacherous. A light dusting of snow blankets everything and the wind has sculpted it into small drifts in many places. There is a small escarpment to the south.

34009.name: The Frozen Waste
34009.description: The frigid temperature turns your breath into frosty plumes with every exhalation. The ground is littered with head-sized chunks of ice and rock which make the footing treacherous. A light dusting of snow blankets everything and the wind has sculpted it into small drifts in many places. Impassable mountains prevent travel to the south and east.

34010.name: The Frozen Waste
34010.description: The frigid temperature turns your breath into frosty plumes with every exhalation. The ground is littered with head-sized chunks of ice and rock which make the footing treacherous. A light dusting of snow blankets everything and the wind has sculpted it into small drifts in many places. Impassable mountains prevent travel to the south and west. Dark iron streaks run thick through the rock.

34013.name: The Frozen Waste
